title: An epigenetic clock for sea turtles
claim_summary: A DNA methylation-based epigenetic clock can accurately predict the age of sea turtles, offering a non-invasive tool for monitoring threatened marine reptile populations.
stated_reason: Coauthor alerted the journal that results in a figure are inaccurate and do not represent a real relationship between age and DNA methylation.
selection_method: Paired with rw-0001 (same first author, same method flaw, different taxon). Cited 32 times. Low fame, niche: marine conservation epigenetics.
publisher_fetch: blocked (Wiley 403 to automated fetch); verified via Crossref + Retraction Watch + notice DOI
corpus_scope: Epigenetic clock methodology in threatened marine reptile conservation
